Wondering if this team is okay or if I should swap someone out (I have Tawil and Lily from that capo paid banner that gives limiteds, same with the capo wheels) I’m STUPID early so I know it shouldn’t matter too much but idk I wanna see if I can swap anyone out to try a new comp ig?
Oh and I’m grabbing Castor from the event where u just use your posse skill
aequor has this problem where tentacles and most of the characters scale badly into late game
Gmurphy is one of the ones that can stay relevant
but tulu caecus goliath are all kinda homeless at level 60
goliath is not even used as a dps late game, just as a str support
because his damage is so bad compared to other options

normally for arc 1 faded legacy, i recommend a team of gmurphy, thais, aigis, flex (in your case the flex can be tulu or goliath)

but your gmurphy doesn't have dupes so won't deal as much damage as she could
if you like mouchette you can pull e3 mouchette and try a mouchette comp
i also recommend pulling for another copy of thais cause her e2 is a big buff
anyway you are still at the stage where team comp doesnt matter too much and you have the freedom to try out different stuff
I did 2 5 pulls and got the wrong SSR twice 🕊️
Guess that e2 is guaranteed
Mm I’ll prolly keep Tulu as the flex slot then since I just like the AoE to clear basic stages in the story
Any thoughts on the wheels tho? Like should I swap anyone’s around

Hello! I'm somewhat of a beginner at the game, and I wanted to know if this Caro tema works, because it seems like I'm not doing any damage
other than that your wheel options are not great so what you have is fine
i can recommend pulling 1 thais wheel and 1 tulu wheel
thais wheel is super good
Gotcha
you'll put the tulu wheel on a support you want to exalt often (like tulu)
and the thais wheel is for your keyflare support
which is probably caecus
you just build keyflare stats on him
in the gmurphy thais aigis tulu comp
you put tulu wheel on thais, and thais wheel on aigis
I would also like to play a good team for Tawil since she is my favorite
ok so there are 2 ways to use tawil, either as a keyflare support or as main dps
normally she is not used in caro
an example team where tawil is the main dps is tawil, Gramona, hameln, karen
this is called "monowil" i.e. mono chaos tawil
the way you play this team is you play nothing but pinions of time and stack your deck with 4 wings, then try to play all of them in one turn
Oh, she can work in the one with the octopuses (I can't remember the name)?
tawil can work in aequor as well
example is tawil, hameln, Gramona, caecus
in that case you use red tentacles during your combo turn so that you get a tentacle followup after every hit
and you time it with caecus exalt so the enemy is vulnerable
doesn't it work with Gmurphy?
you can use gmurphy instead of caecus if you want

Hello friends!
I've read people talking about tank Kath vs DPS Kath. Was wondering what's the difference?

basically DPS Kath just does your standard damage shenanigans, Tank Kath uses Alva’s wheel, the defense SR and Feast from Afar covenant in tandem with her E3 greatly increasing the power of her cards with high fiamma to get some rather ridiculous shields and since her enlightens already give her enough damage, she can just kill everything anyway

Tank Kath generally uses less important resources which is important for D-Tide but DPS Kath of course actually has DPS wheels and covs so can deal more damage

If you have no issue surviving in non-DTide content probably stick to DPS Kath, but if you do+are doing DTide Tank Kath is worth trying it
Fantastic, wish I could favorite discord messages with everything I'm learning these past few days. Appreciate the answer, have a great new Year's! 🍻
for reference, both type of kath should use alva wheel regardless
is the secondary wheel that change depending on what you are going for

That's a team that will scale well with future dupes on pollux/thais as well (and/or castor too)

castor > clem >> corposant > pickman

1. Castor is super good at e0 and can carry a team by himself
2. Clem is a powerful support at e0, but cannot carry a team by herself
3. Corposant is usable at e0 and gets really strong with extra copies (but gmurphy is probably higher priority for you)
4. Pickman is good in caro teams but really prefers to have extra copies

I don't recommend the others cause they are only good with a lot of dupes

you only get 1 copy of the limited unit and most units are only good with dupes, so realistically your options are

castor > clementine >> corposant > pickman

* castor is strongest in terms of raw power cause he can carry an entire team by himself

* clementine is very good support

* corposant is mid at e0 but gets really strong at e2-e3 so you can save for her shop dupes if you like her

* pickman is niche support for caro dps but quite good if u have one, though he also kinda wants dupes to be good

Forget long term here’s some short term changes that will halve the difficulty:
**WoD**
3 SSR: Mericful Nurturing (Thais), Uteri Somi (Murphy base), and Blade of the Titan (Fauxborn)
2 SR: Key (Thais) and To My Dearest Friend (Fauxborn)
The 3 last slots should be Frenzy R, Gluttony R, and Emerge R
**Covenants**
Re-Evolution - Aigis
Life Drain (Ch. 7 stamina) - Thais
Crimson Pulse - Fauxborn
The Rabbit - Murphy; this last one is technically filler but it’s fine
IF you are at that level to reroll covenants you can look into optimizing them, but that’s a whole nother post of content

wheres my copypasta
I don’t like it

**Day 2 Mouchette Impressions** (Aggregated from current top EN players)

**Is Mouchette Powerful:** She is an ok, A~B tier dps. She can clear content. She is not top tier or overpowered. She won't break records unless you invest heavily and whale for her and her wheel

**Stopping Point for Pulls:** E3, but OE is good. I don't recommend using her before E3

**Best Teams:** Mouchette, Helot, Thais, Aigis/other supports. High investment accounts can also try mono chaos with Mouchette, Hameln, Ramona, Ryker/Alva

**Can I Use Her With Lotan/Gelot:** I don't recommend it as you will effectively have 2 dps on the team. A support that adds a damage multiplier to Mouchette, or adds defense or utility which Mouchette lacks, will be more effective than another dps

**Covenant:** Dreams of Medicine (recommended) or Burial Grounds' Sighs (if you have a good set). Prioritize Crit, Death Resist, Keyflare Regen

**Wheels:** Crit, Death Resist, Strike wheels work best. Best in slot are her own wheel + Lily wheel. Lotan wheel, Blade of the Titan, etc. are fine

**Should I Pull Mouchette:** If you like her.

**Should I Pull Mouchette Wheel:** If you are prepared to invest heavily in her. There are other wheels that can substitute

How hard is lategame d tide
Like is it an "I need this specific shilled character at 3+ enlightens to clear it" angle or am i fine with e0 with occasional e1+ and sig wods but might need to work harder for thr clear

Challenging, but fun. Dtide also frontloads most of the rewards you likely care about (pull currency and level 60 uncap materials) to the lower difficulties.

I would say you don't really need to care about "having this specific shilled character" until you are trying to clear a4 and a5 content. For a1 to a3 as long as you have "some dps" and a level 60 team with soulforge talent you should be all set.
